title: Chatsworth® Citronella Incense Sticks & Holder, Pack 30 Sticks
features: SPRING & SUMMER INSECT REPELLENT: Chatsworth Citronella Incense Sticks, perfect to deter annoying bugs, enjoy an outdoor brunch, lunch or dinner on a balcony or in the garden, holder included. Deters insects, produces a clean fresh scent

LONG LASTING : Chatsworth Citronella Incense Sticks, ready to use pack containing a wooden holder and 30 incense sticks, place the incense stick in the holder, light, when glowing, gently blow out the flame and allow the smoke to deter bugs, mosquitoes and other flying insects. Re-light as required

INDOOR & OUTDOOR: Chatsworth Citronella Incense Sticks, place on a patio or garden table to deter evening flying insects. After blowing out the flame, place the holder with stick in the home where windows are open to deter bugs from flying inside. Burn time approx. 45 minutes.

OUTDOOR INSECT FREE BBQ: Enjoy an outdoor BBQ, on the beach, in the garden, beside tent, caravan, on a boat or outside your holiday villa. Light Chatsworth Citronella Incense Stick to deter all the annoying flying insects, whilst enjoying the fresh, uplifting clean lemon scent
